'''hachadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oafdom|oafdom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oafdom|oafdom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hachadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæchædhæth|hæchædhæth]] || [[word:hæchædhæj|hæchædhæj]] || [[word:hæchædhæsh|hæchædhæsh]] || [[word:hæchædhæ|hæchædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hachachadhath|hachachadhath]] || [[word:hachachadhaj|hachachadhaj]] || [[word:hachachadhash|hachachadhash]] || [[word:hachachadha|hachachadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hachadhath|hachadhath]] || [[word:hachadhaj|hachadhaj]] || [[word:hachadhash|hachadhash]] || [[word:hachadha|hachadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hachafdhath|hachafdhath]] || [[word:hachafdhaj|hachafdhaj]] || [[word:hachafdhash|hachafdhash]] || [[word:hachafdhaf|hachafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hachadhatha|hachadhatha]] || [[word:hachadhaja|hachadhaja]] || [[word:hachadhasha|hachadhasha]] || [[word:hachadhaka|hachadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hachadhath|hachadhath]] || [[word:hachadhaj|hachadhaj]] || [[word:hachadhash|hachadhash]] || [[word:hachadha|hachadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hachadhathal|hachadhathal]] || [[word:hachadhajal|hachadhajal]] || [[word:hachadhashal|hachadhashal]] || [[word:hachadhakal|hachadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hachadhathatha|hachadhathatha]] || [[word:hachadhajaja|hachadhajaja]] || [[word:hachadhashasha|hachadhashasha]] || [[word:hachadhaka|hachadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hachadhathan|hachadhathan]] || [[word:hachadhajan|hachadhajan]] || [[word:hachadhashan|hachadhashan]] || [[word:hachadhakan|hachadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hachadhathaoro|hachadhathaoro]] || [[word:hachadhajaoro|hachadhajaoro]] || [[word:hachadhashaoro|hachadhashaoro]] || [[word:hachadhakaoro|hachadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
